nasb.text: The water prevailed more and more upon the earth, so that all the high mountains everywhere under the heavens were covered.

esv.text: And the waters prevailed so mightily on the earth that all the high mountains under the whole heaven were covered.

cnv.text: 水勢在地面上越來越大，天下所有的高山都被淹沒了。

ccb.text: 水势越来越大，把天下各处的高山都淹没了。

csbs.text: 水势在地上极其强盛，天下所有的高山都被淹没了。
